description: Train a Boosting Classification model using the 'ToothGrowth' dataset with 'supp' as the target variable and 'len' and 'dose' as predictors. Configure the analysis with a 30% test set split, 50 trees, and a shrinkage of 0.1. Include the confusion matrix, ROC curve, and out-of-bag improvement plot in the results. Save the analysis to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/BoostingClassification.jasp.
